h318eeb1fg62b0g47ffgb1d2g606f25da1aae: *Shadowheart's attention is fixed on a damaged old helmet.*
h45e869eegfd32g4ddbg813eg8cb55ca26bf3: Nothing. A trick of the light.
h93b00e9dg96f8g490dg920egbef31e80f8cb: But something tells me there might be a solution to some of our problems hiding in this wilderness.
ha8267f9bg23d2g4386g8812gd5231e8cbd3d: Don't worry. What it is, we're in this together.
h88990223ga633g4432gaab3g007e44048311: I... thank you. But I'm sure it was nothing. I just... need a little time to think. Let's go.
h89731998gc1b3g4618g9803g09866bfc3525: Pull yourself together. We've all got fears to wrestle with.
h4ddf5a9cg3522g43c0g957eg88813ae80240: I don't need your tough love. I need time to think. Let's go.
h67f8dd63g8d09g43b2g99cfge93eca7c7063: We should keep going. If I spot anything, I'll let you know.
h9eeecdc1g5ad4g4151g9a5dgda2209cd5ef4: We hardly have time to act on hunches.
h096c3534g8f55g41d3g9c76g94b88effa976: Do as you like. I'll keep watch for anything that may help.
h162e17a3g7f4eg4c3fg9e6agf1d9758c3b40: You're being evasive. Is this something to do with your Shar worship?
h6b16233dga0f5g45bagb7cfgb9eabde1837c: Perhaps. There are signs that Shar's children attacked Selûnites here.
hd0585a0egb619g421bg90bdgd0c60061b785: This fight was a long time ago, clearly, but there may still be a Sharran stronghold nearby.
h2916747dg8104g4174g8634g9f2f919b0e78: Use your shared connection. Enter her thoughts.
h01f8e21cgcc39g4f34gbf14g8b45cd20406b: *Uncertainty. Fear. Shadowheart genuinely doesn't know what just happened, but she's afraid of it.*
hc3ecaaafg5008g4fa4gac2dg5d2f9608a0e9: If there's something else you want to say, I'm listening.
h84a891d1g428ag4364g981cg139a99f61000: There's signs there was a conflict around here - some time ago, and different to what we've seen so far.
h68fcba01g634cg46f5g921bgcccfc1a87bfe: Conflict needs opposing sides. Whoever they were, they must've had resources.
h3641aad3g425dg444aga442ga03ee66b8aa0: A little investigating could turn up something of interest. Let's go.
h128c8564gcc1cg441eg9837g934870a65156: You recognised something here, didn't you? You're a Shar worshipper.
h6efc52bfgd36eg40dcgaee9gd323d2215fe1: ... I should have been more discreet around you, clearly. Yes, you're right.
hc8cb48ceg9039g4e52g8011g38f4869ac077: I worship Shar, the Mistress of the Night. The destruction of this Selûne statue looks like the handiwork of my brothers and sisters.
hf28f537ag0ccfg4b6dg92f1g0c0c9effe862: Don't make a fuss, Selûnite - we may be at odds, but I have more important concerns than you right now.
h8430021dgc9f5g430agab3egbafa95afcf1b: Don't make a big fuss...? You've been lying to me!
h226962e6g0b07g4899ga96agfd3938186cc1: A lie of omission at most. I'm sure you have some skeletons of your own hidden away.
h84ee469eg7a1dg42c4ga5a0gfcca123fe8bc: Secrecy is everything for Shar's children. It's our code, our creed, our shield.
h26f85c05g8a8ag44a2g85f9gfdda2166e413: I even keep secrets from myself - I had my memories suppressed, so that nothing I knew could be used against the Dark Lady. Once I prove myself, my memories will be restored.
hc8cc601cgfa07g446fga1b1gaf4834c91f81: I'm not sorry I kept this from you. Not one bit.
hc7b3d306g54a8g45c9ga890g9e381618115a: Though perhaps that might change, if you can show an open mind.
hab47d8e2g2660g4d9bg9912g47ce2e6d2eb5: Let's see how open-minded I can be then: tell me more.
hc3403059ga08dg4a7egbc03g3958c7ff1f2c: Talk to me later. We've got more pressing matters to see to right now.
h5ceb0323g7fb1g4bd0g91efg18981f82ced9: You think there might still be Shar followers around?
he5beb410g4565g40ffg8176g0c89643ac5aa: The trail's long-cold... but perhaps. We can discuss this later. Let's go.
h0052c398g3a74g453bg8a87g44f254249840: We can discuss this later. But let's just try a little more honesty going foward.
h97023883ge45ag418egb6e8gb0567ceb1269: All we can do is try, I suppose...
heb05908cg51a7g4686gaf7agbc9dd19b116a: I don't know how I feel about this.
h16548ec4g3570g43a7ga38dg58bc08026ca3: Who says you have to feel anything?
hc9355e05g16e2g4f78g996bg20ab6ea5a5b3: Gather your throughts. Then perhaps we can talk some more.
h67a968bdg1ce8g4770gaf0aga3a4e21c498d: You could have told me. How long were you going to keep this secret?
hfc9b687dg742bg4324g826bgba588b94196f: Forever, ideally. And you assume too much about what I can and cannot tell.
h3f2fae94ga2f2g4092gbc40g03a8d10ede1c: I didn't agree to join up with a Shar worshipper.
h607203e1g33aag4e15g8ddfgea8d41614b48: Then it's your own fault for not asking.
h0a645716gddcdg4f92gb946gf8da995348d9: Now that the truth's out, tell me more.
h4174c1b6g8731g4e5cg8dceg8896515b0a94: It's been some time since I met another faithful of Shar. Are you versed in her teachings?
hb17bfe48gbe84g42efgb42cg8b55d98b0871: Of course I am. But we can talk about this later - let's go.
h46aff775gb5a0g4103g9499g264da9a26efa: In future, I expect you to be honest. Let's leave it at that for now.
h23362fd7gf4a3g43b8g989fg667cadf0acd5: I can't trust you. Best if we travel separately for now.
hc8269f36g1c4dg4d8cg815bgeb7ace75e552: If you insist. Don't expect to fare well without me to save you.
h605bf154gf018g492agbfe6ga0c4b40c88eb: I don't care who you worship. We have bigger problems.
hee258c18g8f18g4368g98cfg21c80c882eae: True. I didn't think you'd react so pragmatically. Perhaps I should have told you sooner.
hbec371feg1bc7g42aagb498g5182fa66b4ba: Shar is an abomination. You deceived me.
hd7608aaag8da2g4622gaedag1487aa70d5d9: Your blindness as much as my deception, Selûnite. We can talk about this later - if you're willing.
hd8a71f19gdfdeg45dega04fg4b9f83a84cc0: I bow to Shar also. The Dark Lady must favour us, to have brought us together.
heb14e95eg7525g4987gafc8gd93e12b23139: I... yes, she must. I'll offer thanks to her in my prayers - and we should speak more later. Alone, ideally.
he30a969dge9dcg44c5gb12eg2eb91302bbd2: Fantastic. Monsters in our minds, and around our campfire.
ha75350c4g0d10g427bgac43gc3f27d820fb5: Heavens forbid. We're all entitled to our secrets.
hb34cf639g498cg434bgb841gfce9e8f79a22: Knew there was something off about you. Wasn't expecting this though
h762deb34gae25g45e6gb6a1g2a03de9deeee: A Shar worshipper? Not my usual quarry - nor my usual ally.
h854ed937gc134g4ab6ga635g8460f814d021: You worship Shar? Blimey. She and my beloved Mystra are not exactly friends.
h9349fd2ag89f4g4f18g95e6gcbe7ff621553: Now that you have the truth, please don't make a big fuss about it.
h5cb30a63g9abag46edg8f1ag108eba7fd220: I worship Shar, the Mistress of the Night. This type of helmet is worn by my brothers and sisters.
h1e7dc550g113fg49b9gaa5eg5b82f5c6f53a: I worship Shar, the Mistress of the Night. The events in this diary sound like the handiwork of my brothers and sisters.
h0cc07446gce6ag48bbga27bg78fb9bae88b5: There's more to this. What aren't you telling me?
ha0df8395g1b9fg4555g932ag1a3778231095: You're not going to let this go, are you?
h503140dbg01fag47dega7ecgabf145317643: It's nothing. Even if it was something, I'm clearly not going to tell you, am I? Let's go.
h6dce4ad4g6faag4851g91d3g4d0638e22a30: Enter her thoughts and see what she's hiding.
ha7c737d5ga4cdg4267ga884g74bc5f4ab26b: *You sense her mind dwelling on the graffiti. Symbols of the goddess Shar. Her goddess.*
h933e10fdg6b75g4a6ag929eg5f1c4a4534af: *You sense her mind dwelling on the helmet - that of a Dark Justiciar, follower of the goddess Shar. Her goddess.*
hd468c0acg6e82g4f61g8ecag3e7fff0be288: *You sense her mind dwelling on the events in the diary. The work of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers. The same as her.*
h2299f3b1ga81eg4af3g9d34ga4c32aac80d5: Stop! If I want to tell you something, I'll use my mouth - understand?
h9a21b7f6g35e9g409bga815g8d5ee1bf8256: Fumble in my head again and I'll gut you.
h27e5559dge3cdg4f50g8cfag4100ef4598fd: No. You'll understand when you see it. Let's go.
ha4180eadg2907g4640gbfa0g8baf9cbd43ce: *Shadowheart's attention is fixed upon the contents of an old journal.*
h93f43f87gb6d9g4258g9b87gfaf54b6ce37b: *Shadowheart's attention is fixed on a damaged old statue.*
